verdict_reasoning: Owner-simulation dry run completed end-to-end against the committed local system (HEAD/origin-dev 0372524, origin/main 69e6731 untouched). Source unchanged. Backend + frontend both started. Owner walkthrough covered: claims queue + KPI summary + demo scenario; CLM-1006 details + customer/vehicle + policy + risk + audit + approval; 7 documents (1 missing flagged); 4 safe write commands all returned success with audit+outbox; idempotency replay deduplicates outbox while preserving the second audit (intentional 'attempt recorded, side-effect published once'); Mock AI advisory shape complete; real DeepSeek opt-in HTTP 200 in 6s with run_6fcc493e / deepseek-v4-flash / 702 tokens / conf 75 / English summary / all guardrails advisory-only and every Can-* false; 15/15 advisory-only UI strings in JS bundle; adversarial probes confirmed no /payout, /customer-messages, /fraud-confirm endpoint exists, invalid decision-enum rejected with helpful message, unknown claim returns sanitized 'no_ai_analysis_run' error. Zero forbidden audit events across all four categories. Single LIMITATION: no browser-DOM automation available, so visual rendering of the AI advisory card and guardrail pills is verified by JS-bundle string presence + HTTP smoke evidence only — DOM-level pixel verification deferred to the operator manual checkpoint. Slava can proceed to MANUAL_OPERATOR_CLICK_THROUGH_SMOKE with high confidence.

demonstrable_in_interview_or_portfolio: Backend: .NET 9, EF Core 9, 6 service-owned schemas with own DbContexts + migrations, BFF/API gateway, sanitized error envelopes, idempotency, audit + outbox-as-record-of-side-effects

AI: provider abstraction (IAiProvider) with three opt-in-gated providers, advisory-only guardrails enforced at the GuardrailFlags type level (private ctor + immutable Advisory singleton), forbidden-token scan via AdvisoryOnlyGuardrailEvaluator, real DeepSeek HTTP adapter with bounded retry + sanitized error path
Frontend: React + TypeScript + Vite + Redux Toolkit + Redux Saga + shadcn/ui, BFF-only API surface, env-driven facade switch (mock/backend), Ukrainian + English content paths
Testing: 119 backend tests including 6 retry-semantics tests; smoke evidence triple (host log + DB fingerprint + shape) preserved across 6 historical real DeepSeek runs
Security: secret stays out of repo / appsettings / csproj / logs / exceptions; opt-in resolved at request time via IConfiguration; rotation precedent documented
what_the_project_proves_technically: Multi-AI workflow (implementer + reviewer + auditor) with bounded gate prompts can ship audit-grade work without privileged access leaks
Provider-agnostic AI integration without SDK lock-in; raw HttpClient + structured JSON contract
Domain authority separation: AI is advisory; human decision is final by design (compile-time type-level guarantee, not runtime check)
still_intentionally_local_only: LocalDB SQL Server (no Azure SQL yet)
DEEPSEEK_API_KEY in user-scope env (no Key Vault yet)
No Application Insights / no App Configuration / no managed identity
No HTTPS termination / no rate-limiting at edge / no CDN
must_be_visually_checked_by_operator_in_: AI advisory card renders correctly with provider chip, model badge, summary, recommended-action read-only block, policy explanation, all 7 guardrail pills colour-coded
Page does NOT show any decision-as-action button (approve-payout/reject/fraud-confirm/send-message)
Switching between Mock and DeepSeek modes (via env var + restart) produces visibly different content and metadata
must_not_be_claimed_yet_before_azure: Production-ready security posture (current state is single-machine demo)
SLA on AI latency (only local-environment timings)

screenshots_or_limitation: No screenshots captured — no browser automation in this environment. Visual rendering verification relied on: (1) frontend preview HTTP 200 + correct served title; (2) JS bundle string presence for all 15 advisory-only UI labels; (3) backend Mock + real DeepSeek HTTP smoke through the BFF — the upstream contract the UI consumes is sound; (4) bundle does NOT contain any decision-as-action keywords beyond the 5 read-only Can-* labels in their negation context.
limitations: No browser-DOM automation available; visual rendering of AI advisory card + guardrail pills + provider/risk chips deferred to operator manual click-through

next_safe_step: MANUAL_OPERATOR_CLICK_THROUGH_SMOKE — operator (Slava) can now confidently do a hands-on browser walk of the AI Analysis page in both Mock and DeepSeek opt-in modes; the upstream contract is proven sound and every backend safety check has passed in this simulation. Suggested operator checklist: (1) start backend + frontend, (2) open Claims list → click CLM-1006, (3) navigate to AI Evidence page, (4) confirm advisory card renders with provider chip + 7 guardrail pills, (5) click 'Запустити AI-аналіз' in Mock mode and confirm visible update, (6) restart backend with --AiProvider:Mode=DeepSeek --AiProvider:RealCallsEnabled=true and re-run to confirm visible provider/model change.
